message:
test(fcp-conformance): AuthClaims cross-crate byte-equivalence (br-8n0rm.7)

5 conformance tests assert the typed AuthClaims schema in
fcp-auth-schema and the builder path in fcp-crypto::cose emit the
same bytes for equivalent inputs:

- auth_claims_canonical_cbor_survives_builder_roundtrip: schema-crate
  canonical CBOR ↔ CapabilityTokenBuilder::with_claims round-trip
- minimal_claims_golden_vector: 3-entry canonical map shape for
  minimal claim set; label ordering locked in
- full_claims_roundtrip_conformance: every typed field populated,
  round-trip lossless
- unsupported_schema_version_rejected_at_conformance_level:
  check_schema_version enforces the accepted window
- canonical_cbor_is_byte_deterministic: three encodes byte-identical

These tests ARE the wire-format contract for claim tokens. Any change
that breaks them is a schema_version bump per
docs/architecture/adr/8n0rm-claim-schema-versioning.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
